zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期关注支撑位]
zh.content:
当前比特币/美元的价格为76642.29，近期价格走势显示出震荡整理的迹象。在24小时内，价格变化仅为-0.17%，说明市场情绪较为平稳。不过，短期内价格未能突破76789.35的高点，可能面临一定的压力。

从技术指标来看，虽然RSI数据缺失，但根据当前价格与SMA(20)的关系，价格刚好位于76093.95之上，显示出一定的支撑力度。MACD指标显示出301.44058的数值，表明目前存在一定的买盘力量，若后续数据能持续向好，可能会对价格形成支撑。

在支撑和阻力方面，76093.95作为短期支撑位，如果价格跌破此位，则可能会引发进一步下跌，测试76366.43的低点。相对的，76789.35将是重要的阻力位，突破后有望进一步上涨，吸引更多的买盘入场。

因此，建议投资者在当前震荡行情中保持观望，密切关注价格动向。一旦确认向上突破76789.35，可以考虑适度增仓；反之，若价格下破76093.95，则应谨慎止损，以减少风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin has recently shown mild consolidation around the $76,600–$76,700 range, reflecting a temporary pause after modest bullish momentum. The short-term trend appears cautiously bullish, supported by the price sitting above the 20-day SMA at $76,093.95. Despite this, intraday volatility remains evident, with the daily high of $76,789 and low of $76,366, indicating market indecision. Traders should note that breaking either boundary decisively could signal a continuation of the prevailing short-term momentum.  

The MACD reading at 301.44 suggests underlying bullish energy, though the lack of a signal line limits the ability to confirm crossovers. Typically, rising MACD values above the SMA reinforce upward pressure, but the small negative 24-hour change hints that buyers are currently exercising caution. Absence of the RSI metric restricts insight into overbought or oversold conditions, but price behavior near SMA suggests a balanced market with no extreme sentiment.  

Immediate support lies near $76,100, closely aligned with the 20-day SMA, providing a reasonable entry zone for risk-conscious traders. Resistance is likely encountered around $76,800, with potential extension toward $77,000 if bullish momentum accelerates. Intraday swings between these levels may offer short-term scalping opportunities, while longer-term positions would benefit from monitoring trend confirmation on higher timeframes such as the 4-hour or daily charts.  

Traders may consider a conservative approach: buy on dips near support while setting tight stop-losses below $76,000 to manage downside risk. Conversely, cautious profit-taking near resistance could prevent exposure to sudden retracements. Overall, the market exhibits mild bullish tendencies but lacks strong confirmation, warranting disciplined position sizing and attentive monitoring of volatility and momentum shifts before committing to larger trades.
